name: Music / Piano
description: Fun fact: I minored in music in college, particularly from a classical piano perspective! This is why music is very near and dear to my heart, and for fun I love creating tools that assist in musical endeavors.

name: Southeast Asian Cultural Awareness
description: During my undergraduate studies, I was heavily involved in my campus's Southeast Asia Club (SEAC) through roles like Digital Media Chair and President. I love fostering community and raising awareness of Southeast Asian, particularly Thai, culture.

name: Art & Comics
description: Something I'm particularly passionate about is dabbling in graphic design and making comics about my life!
